case_title: ADRIAN PERALTA VS. EMERALD AUTO REPAIR

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE ATTACHED DOCUMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAY-05-2022 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-05-2022 10:00 AM FOR DEPT 210

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT PERALTA, ADRIAN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT EMERALD AUTO REPAIR $671.84 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $671.84, PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT WAS PAID $1000 BY DEFENDANT OTHERWISE JUDGMENT WOULD BE FOR$1671.84 BASED ON RECEIPT EVIDENCE FOR DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT'S CAR. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERALTA, ADRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMERALD AUTO REPAIR $8,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $149.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,549.00, THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THE PLAINTIFF'S CAR WAS STOLEN WHILE IT WAS IN THE CARE AND CUSTODY OF THE DEFENDANT FROM JULY 21, 2021 TO JULY 28, 2021. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Adrian Peralta appeared on his own behalf via Zoom.
Jim Gavney, owner, appeared on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Emerald Auto Repair.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Plaintiff/Respondent Adrian Peralta sworn and testified on his own behalf.
Jim Gavney sworn and testified on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Emerald Auto Repair.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibit 1: Advanced Autoservice Repair Receipt
Defendant/Appellant's Exhibit A: Emerald Auto Repair Repair Request Form

Appellant's and Respondent's original exhibits are returned. Copies of the exhibits are retained by the Court and may be discarded.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (210)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Set For Trial On May-05-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 210

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Continued To May-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Continued To May-18-22 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 210
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Adrian Peralta appeared on his own behalf.
Jim Gavney, owner, appeared on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Emerald Auto Repair.
This cause comes on regularly for appeal of denial of motion to vacate.
Jim Gavney sworn and testified on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Emerald Auto Repair.
Plaintiff/Respondent Adrian Peralta sworn and testified on his own behalf.
Court grants the motion to set aside the Order of March 23, 2022 which denied the motion to vacate default judgment. Judgment of November 8, 2021, is set aside.
Trial de novo set for May 18, 2022, at 1:30pm in Department 210.
Court approves witness appearances via Zoom.
Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (210)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2022 Denied

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2022 Continued To Mar-23-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Judgment Entered
